title: Regulator Halts Key Tata Trusts Meeting, Citing Pending Probe
title_cn: 监管机构以悬而未决的调查为由暂停重要的塔塔信托会议
summary: An Indian state regulator has ordered Tata Trusts to postpone its board meeting scheduled for May 16 and halt further engagements until an investigation into alleged regulatory violations is completed.

title_cn: 英国债务闹剧背后的真正原因是什么
summary: Unless the Bank of England indulged in a mad selling spree, there are other reasons for Friday’s jump in UK yields.

title: Without Migrants, Spain Says Bars Would Shut and Services Suffer
title_cn: 西班牙称如果没有移民，酒吧就会关闭，服务也会受到影响
summary: The opposition parties seeking to shut down Madrid’s pro-migrant policies are jeopardizing key pillars of Spanish life, the Socialist-led government says.

title: Long Island Rail Workers Strike in First Walkout Since 1994
title_cn: 长岛铁路工人自 1994 年以来首次罢工
summary: The Long Island Rail Road, the nation’s busiest commuter line, will suspend service for the first time in more than 30 years after labor groups and transit officials failed to reach a deal on wage increases by a Friday night deadline.

title: Rare Ebola Strain With No Approved Vaccine Kills Dozens in Congo
title_cn: 未经批准疫苗的罕见埃博拉病毒株在刚果造成数十人死亡
summary: A rare strain of Ebola with no approved vaccine or treatment may have circulated undetected for weeks in conflict-hit northeastern Democratic Republic of Congo before killing dozens of people.

title: Trump Says US Forces, Nigeria Armed Forces Killed ISIS Leader
title_cn: 特朗普称美军和尼日利亚武装部队击毙了伊斯兰国领导人
summary: US and Nigerian forces killed an ISIS leader who was hiding in Africa, President Donald Trump said, adding that his death has “greatly diminished” the group’s global operations.

title: VinFast Seeks to Shed Most Debt With Vietnam Factory Spinoffs
title_cn: VinFast 寻求通过分拆越南工厂来摆脱大部分债务
summary: VinFast Auto Ltd. said its planned sale of two Vietnamese factories will enable the electric vehicle maker to shed about 182 trillion dong ($6.9 billion) in debt and obligations while potentially speed its path toward profitability.

title: NextEra Energy Is Said to Be in Talks to Acquire Dominion
title_cn: 据称 NextEra Energy 正在洽谈收购 Dominion
summary: NextEra Energy Inc. is in discussions to acquire utility rival Dominion Energy Inc. in a mostly stock deal aimed at helping address the growing demand for power from data centers, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Adnoc Keeps Loading LNG Onto Tankers Gone Dark in Persian Gulf
title_cn: Adnoc 继续向波斯湾陷入黑暗的油轮装载液化天然气
summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. is continuing to load liquefied natural gas onto tankers masking their location in the Persian Gulf, as the energy producer pushes to get more fuel through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Kentucky Derby-Winning Trainer Cherie DeVaux on Business of Horse Racing
title_cn: 肯塔基德比获胜练马师 Cherie DeVaux 谈赛马业务
summary: Kentucky Derby-Winning trainer Cherie DeVaux joins the show to discuss the decision not to run Golden Tempo in the Preakness. She discusses the timeline between the races which played a factor in her decision to withdraw from the race. She speaks with Katie Greifeld & David Papadopoulos on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Enbridge CEO on Canada Pipelines, Natural Gas Outlook
title_cn: 安桥首席执行官谈加拿大管道、天然气前景
summary: Enbridge President & CEO Greg Ebel discusses the agreement between Canada and the Alberta province about the carbon tax deal. He discusses the ramifications for future pipelines in the country and how it can affect North America at large going forward. He speaks with Katie Greifeld & Isabelle Lee on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Post Worst Day Since March as Bonds Get Hit: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于债券受到打击，股市经历了三月份以来最糟糕的一天：市场总结
summary: A selloff in global bonds halted a rally in stocks, with concern intensifying that central banks will be forced to tighten policy to keep inflation in check amid persistently elevated oil prices.

title: Berkshire Sold $8 Billion of Chevron Shares as Prices Soared
title_cn: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司出售价值 80 亿美元的雪佛龙股票，股价飙升
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. sold about $8 billion worth of Chevron Corp. shares in the first quarter as the oil giant’s stock reached a record high.

title: Berkshire Amasses $2.6 Billion Stake in Delta Airlines
title_cn: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司斥资 26 亿美元收购达美航空
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. amassed a $2.6 billion stake in Delta Airlines Inc., reigniting the conglomerate’s complicated relationship with the airline industry.

title: Forbright Files for IPO Pitching Middle Market, Digital Banking
title_cn: Forbright 提交 IPO 推介中间市场、数字银行业务
summary: Forbright Inc., a financial services platform that focuses on middle-market lending and digital consumer banking, filed for an initial public offering showing growing deposits.

title: Advent to Sell Up to €1.5 Billion InPost Loan to Banks
title_cn: Advent 将向银行出售高达 15 亿欧元的 InPost 贷款
summary: Advent International LP seeks to sell about a third of a €4.2 billion ($4.9 billion) buyout loan for Polish parcel-locker company InPost SA to a group of banks, before the rest is marketed to institutional investors.

title: Argentina’s YPF Seeks Incentive Program for $25 Billion Oil Project
title_cn: 阿根廷 YPF 寻求 250 亿美元石油项目激励计划
summary: State-run Argentine energy giant YPF SA announced a $25 billion project to accelerate oil production, marking the largest investment since President Javier Milei took office.

title: Fuel Costs Driving Demand to Buses, Says Flix North America CEO
title_cn: Flix 北美首席执行官表示，燃料成本推动了巴士需求
summary:
Kai Boysan, CEO of Flix bus company in North America, said that high fuel costs have historically pushed people from personal cars and air travel to bus trips as consumers look for affordable ways to travel. Boysan said that his company is focused on reliability and bus amenities like comfortable seats and wifi to drive customer satisfaction.  
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Equities & Bonds Take a Hit To Close the Week | Closing Bell
title_cn: 股票和债券本周收盘受挫|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Markets Cap Worst Week Since March on Inflation Fears
title_cn: 新兴市场因通胀担忧迎来三月份以来最糟糕的一周
summary: Emerging-market assets tumbled Friday, pushing both stocks and currencies to their worst weekly drop since early March, on renewed concern the conflict in the Middle East will fuel global inflation and force central banks to pursue higher interest rates.

title: SpaceX Said to Plan Public IPO Filing as Soon as Wednesday
title_cn: SpaceX 据称计划最快周三公开 IPO
summary: SpaceX is seeking to file publicly for its long-awaited IPO as soon as Wednesday, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Dollar Notches Best Week Since Early March on Fed Hike View
title_cn: 美联储加息观点推动美元创三月初以来最佳单周表现
summary: The dollar finished its best week in over two months after US data showed price pressures that could push the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates over the next year.

title: The Global Bond Rout Catches Up With Wall Street’s Risk Rally
title_cn: 全球债券溃败赶上了华尔街的风险反弹
summary: Wall Street’s hard-charging risk rally just ran into the bond market.

title: Traders Dump Chipmakers as Rising Yields Drive US Stock Selloff
title_cn: 由于收益率上升推动美国股市抛售，交易商纷纷抛售芯片制造商
summary: Wall Street offloaded semiconductor companies and other high-flying technology shares Friday following a weeks-long, record-setting rally as rising bond yields curbed investors’ appetite for risky bets.

title: Global Bond Selloff Worsens as Rising Oil Prices Spook Investors
title_cn: 油价上涨令投资者恐慌，全球债券抛售加剧
summary: Government bond markets tumbled around the world, sending yields surging from Japan to the US on intensifying fears that the war-driven price shock will force central banks to raise interest rates to contain the impact.

title: Alberta Premier Smith on New Pipeline Proposal
title_cn: 艾伯塔省省长史密斯谈新管道提案
summary: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith discusses plans for a new pipeline to the west coast of Canada and expects Asian firms will invest. She speaks with Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ford Falls Most in 15 Months After AI-Driven Rally Abates
title_cn: 人工智能驱动的涨势减弱后，福特股价跌幅为 15 个月来最大
summary: Ford Motor Co.’s blistering rally screeched to a halt Friday, as a broader market selloff cooled enthusiasm over the automaker’s potential to benefit from the boom in energy demand for artificial intelligence.

title: Meet The 26-Year-Old Undercutting BlackRock and Goldman ETFs
title_cn: 来认识一下已有 26 年历史的贝莱德和高盛 ETF
summary: Corgi is barking about buffers

title: GIC, Itausa Lead $1 Billion Injection in Aegea, Diluting Equipav
title_cn: GIC 和 Itausa 牵头向 Aegea 注资 10 亿美元，稀释 Equipav
summary: Aegea will receive as much as $1 billion in fresh capital from shareholders, led by Singapore sovereign wealth fund GIC Pte and Itaúsa SA, as it prepares a potential bid for Minas Gerais’ state-owned utility Copasa, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Needs Another Decade to Fix $1.2 Trillion Rare Earth Crisis
title_cn: 美国还需要十年来解决价值 1.2 万亿美元的稀土危机
summary: Rare earths are the backbone of modern tech, and China has cornered the global market for them. As it uses that dominance as geopolitical leverage, can other countries break its grip? Joe Deaux, Bloomberg News Corporate and Economic Statecraft Reporter joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss why global powers are racing to secure rare earths.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ackman Takes $2.1 Billion Microsoft Stake in Tech Bet
title_cn: 阿克曼在科技赌注中入股微软 21 亿美元
summary: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square has built a $2.1 billion stake in Microsoft Corp., taking advantage of a decline in the company’s share price to invest in a business that he said is stronger and more resilient than investors think.

title: China Data Centers Tap Spot Power Trading First Time: Report
title_cn: 中国数据中心首次启动现货电力交易：报告
summary: China’s large-scale data centers have joined electricity spot trading as virtual power plants for the first time, marking a shift in how computing demand interacts with the grid, a report in an official media said.

title: Europe Lacks Everything Needed to Make Its Stock Market a Winner
title_cn: 欧洲缺乏使其股市成为赢家所需的一切
summary: The equity story that powered European stocks has unraveled as investors seek shelter from a global energy shock and buy into the artificial intelligence frenzy.

title: SpaceX Holders Sign Off on 5-for-1 Stock Split Ahead of IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 股东在 IPO 前签署 5 拆 1 的股票分割协议
summary: SpaceX notified investors that it is executing a 5-for-1 stock split, a move that will reduce the price investors will pay for each share offered in its impending initial public offering.

title: Snap, YouTube, TikTok Settle School Suit Targeting Social Media
title_cn: Snap、YouTube、TikTok 和解针对社交媒体的学校诉讼
summary: Snap Inc., Google’s YouTube and ByteDance Ltd.’s TikTok reached agreements to settle the first lawsuit headed to trial over claims that addiction to top social media platforms has disrupted learning and pushed public schools to spend massive sums fighting a mental health crisis, according to court filings.

title: Korea Bond Yields Seen Gaining on Chips Boom, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师表示，韩国债券收益率因筹码繁荣而上涨
summary: South Korea’s bond are set to extend this year’s rout as a semiconductor boom supercharges the nation’s economic growth and adds to inflationary pressures, analysts say.

title: Trump Discussed Nvidia Chips With Xi Jinping | Bloomberg Tech 5/15/2026
title_cn: 特朗普与习近平讨论英伟达芯片 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow break down the latest from Beijing after President Trump says he discussed Nvidia's H200 chips with Xi Jinping. Plus, they speak with the CEO of Figma after its earnings results defy fears that AI would disrupt the design stack. And, Caroline's conversation with OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar, who says the startup may raise more capital after completing its recent fundraising round. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Bond Selloff Deepens as Oil Prices Rise | The Close 5/15/2026
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，全球债券抛售加剧收盘价 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Morgan Stanley’s Andrew Slimmon, China Moon Strategies President Jeff Moon, Bernstein Research’s Stacy Rasgon, Enbridge President & CEO Greg Ebel, Alberta Premier Danielle Smith, Moneta Managing Director of Global Wealth Aoifinn Devitt, JP Morgan’s Aaron Mulvihill, Kentucky Derby Winning Trainer Cherie DeVaux, Columbia Threadneedle Investments’s Mari Shor, Neuberger Berman’s Daniel Flax (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm Holdings to Face US Antitrust Probe Over Chip Tech
title_cn: Arm 控股公司将面临美国芯片技术反垄断调查
summary: Arm Holdings Plc is facing an antitrust investigation by the US Federal Trade Commission over the UK company’s licensing of its semiconductor technology, part of ongoing global scrutiny of the business, people familiar with the matter said.

title: From Trade to Taiwan, What the Trump-Xi Summit Did (and Didn’t) Accomplish
title_cn: 从贸易到台湾，特习峰会做了（和没做）什么
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast: President Trump’s summit with Xi Jinping offered good optics, but gave little indication of progress on major sticking points.

title: Sheila Bair on Finding a Good Workplace
title_cn: 希拉·贝尔 (Sheila Bair) 谈如何找到一个好的工作场所
summary:
Barry sits down with Former FDIC Chair Sheila Bair. They discuss the release of her latest book "How Not To Lose A Million Dollars" and the importance of financial literacy across age groups. Bair also discusses her concerns about crypto and the rise of Buy Now, Pay Later.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Figure CEO Says No Teleoperation in Their Humanoid Robot Testing
title_cn: Figure 首席执行官表示，他们的人形机器人测试中没有远程操作
summary: Figure, a robotics company developing humanoid robots that operate via AI, is running a livestream of one of its robots sorting packages in real time to show off its capabilities. The livestream was watched by millions across YouTube and X, but drew some skepticism. Figure CEO Brett Adcock joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to counter claims that its robots are teleoperated. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Figma Jumps as Results Ease AI Disruption Concerns
title_cn: Figma 业绩大幅增长，缓解了人工智能颠覆的担忧
summary: Figma shares rose after the creative software platform reported first-quarter results that beat expectations and raised its full-year forecast, with analysts saying the report eased concerns about AI-related disruption. Figma CEO Dylan Field joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Sector Needs More Talent, Says SEMI
title_cn: SEMI表示美国芯片行业需要更多人才
summary: President Trump says he discussed guardrails on AI and Nvidia's H200 chips with Chinese leader Xi Jinping during a two-day summit in Beijing. Shari Liss, vice president of global workforce development and initiatives at SEMI, joins Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss what this means for the US semiconductor sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Is Starting to See Heavy Job Losses in Roles Exposed to AI
title_cn: 美国开始看到接触人工智能的岗位大量失业
summary: Several US occupations expected to be impacted by artificial intelligence saw heavy job losses for a second year in 2025, led by customer service representatives and certain types of secretaries and salespeople.

title: Cerebras CEO Is Worth $3.2 Billion After Year’s Largest IPO
title_cn: Cerebras 首席执行官在完成年度最大 IPO 后身价 32 亿美元
summary:
Shares of Cerebras Systems Inc. soared about 68% in Nasdaq trading in New York. It’s the year’s biggest initial public offering and gives the company a market value of roughly $67 billion. 
Bailey Lipschultz, Bloomberg News Senior Equities Reporter, discusses the initial offering and how the company is differentiating itself from incumbents like Nvidia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fermi Alters Rules to Foil Ex-CEO Push to Remake Board
title_cn: 费米改变规则以挫败前首席执行官重组董事会的努力
summary: US power-plant developer Fermi Inc. changed its rules around director appointments to block efforts by its former chief executive officer to reshape the company’s board.

title: Atari’s Tycoon CEO Is Aiming for a New Retro Revival
title_cn: 雅达利大亨首席执行官的目标是新的复古复兴
summary: Wade Rosen, the 41-year-old son of a wealthy Minnesota family, is aiming to make Atari the best retro video-game company in the world

title: Apple-OpenAI Alliance Frays
title_cn: 苹果与 OpenAI 联盟的争执
summary:
Apple Inc.’s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has become strained, according to people familiar with the matter, with the AI startup failing to see the expected benefits from the deal and now preparing possible legal action. 
Anurag Rana, Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst, joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MiniMed Aims to Be 'Self-Driving Car' of Diabetes Care
title_cn: MiniMed 旨在成为糖尿病护理的“自动驾驶汽车”
summary: Diabetes equipment provider MiniMed is aiming to be the “self-driving car” of insulin pumps, says its CEO, Que Dallara. Hot off the heels of the company’s IPO, Dallara speaks with Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Delivery Hero Shares Cap Best Week Ever as Breakup Odds Rise
title_cn: 随着分手几率上升，送货英雄分享了有史以来最好的一周
summary: Signs that Delivery Hero SE may be preparing to sell more assets have powered the beaten-down stock to the best week since its 2017 listing.

title: Inside Paul Tudor Jones’ Sports AI Startup
title_cn: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 的体育人工智能初创公司内部
summary: SumerSports, a startup founded by Paul Tudor Jones, is trying to transform football using artificial intelligence. SūmerSports CEO Lorrissa Horton joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how NFL teams are using frame-by-frame AI tracking for scouting, player development, predictive play analysis, and fan engagement. It's all powered by hedge-fund style analytics that was originally inspired by fantasy football. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Revolut Offers All Staffers £1000 to Help Lure In New Business
title_cn: Revolut 向所有员工提供 1000 英镑以帮助吸引新业务
summary: Revolut Ltd. Chief Executive Officer Nik Storonsky is offering employees across the digital bank £1000 ($1,334) to woo more businesses to bank with Revolut, setting it as its highest priority to further boost the digital lender’s growth, valuation and revenue.

title: UnitedHealth Tracks Workers’ AI Use in Push to Transform Company
title_cn: UnitedHealth 追踪员工在推动公司转型过程中使用人工智能的情况
summary: UnitedHealth Group Inc. is tracking how often some employees use artificial intelligence tools as part of a push to embed the technology throughout its operations, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Hackers Armed With AI Stoke Fears for $130 Billion Crypto Sector
title_cn: 配备人工智能的黑客引发了对 1300 亿美元加密货币行业的恐惧
summary: The crypto hacks came a little over two weeks apart in April, netting the attackers almost $600 million in total while triggering an investor exodus from one major platform and causing another to fail.

title: Cerebras Pulls Back After IPO Day; Gemini Space Station Rises on $100M Investment | Stock Movers
title_cn: Cerebras 在 IPO 日后撤资；双子座空间站投资 1 亿美元崛起 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Gemini Space Station (GEMI) is rising after Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss made a $100 million “strategic investment” into the company. CEO Tyler Winklevoss said the investment will help fuel the company's ambition to evolve from a crypto company into a markets company.
- Magnum Ice Cream (MICC) shares are jumped as much as 22%, the most since the stock’s December listing, after Reuters reported that private equity firms including Blackstone and Clayton Dubilier & Rice are exploring potential bids for the company.
- Cerebras Systems (CBRS) shares pulled back after a huge IPO day yesterday. The shares jumped 68% in its trading debut after raising $5.5 billion in the year’s largest IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI, Robotics Key to Transforming Health Care: BD CEO
title_cn: BD 首席执行官：人工智能、机器人技术是医疗保健转型的关键
summary: Tom Polen, CEO of medical technology company BD, says that in the next decade AI and robotics will transform health care in ways that will make today’s system seem archaic. Polen sits down with Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Consello Spark Summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SambaNova Challenges Cerebras Strategy
title_cn: SambaNova 挑战 Cerebras 战略
summary: SambaNova CEO Rodrigo Liang joined Bloomberg  Open Interest to explain why the next AI war won’t be about training models, but rather it will be about  inference costs, compute shortages, and who can scale AI infrastructure profitably. In a direct contrast with Cerebras after its blockbuster IPO, Liang breaks down the coming AI supply crunch, exploding enterprise demand, and why inference could become the biggest business in tech. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Rival Bolt, China’s Dongfeng Reach South Africa EV Deal
title_cn: Uber 竞争对手 Bolt、中国东风 Reach 南非电动汽车交易
summary: Bolt Technology OU agreed a deal with China’s Dongfeng Motor Group Co. to roll out an electric-vehicle fleet in South Africa that Yugo Rides will manage.

title: Kosovo Is Still Pushing for Recognition — Now It’s Building an Army
title_cn: 科索沃仍在争取承认——现在正在建设一支军队
summary: Ejup Maqedonci has worn three uniforms over the past 27 years: first as a young rebel fighting for Kosovar independence, then as a member of an interim humanitarian body, and now as defense minister shaping the nation’s military.

title: Putin to Visit China May 19-20 for Talks With Xi, Kremlin Says
title_cn: 克里姆林宫表示，普京将于 5 月 19 日至 20 日访华，与习近平举行会谈
summary: The Kremlin confirmed President Vladimir Putin’s visit to China on May 19-20, days after President Xi Jinping’s summit in the Chinese capital with his US counterpart Donald Trump.

title: China Steps Up Criticism of EU With Second Ministry Rebuke
title_cn: 中国第二次谴责欧盟，加大对欧盟的批评力度
summary: China’s commerce ministry pushed back against the EU’s use of its Foreign Subsidies Regulation, the second objection from Beijing in two days after the justice ministry said related cross-border probes constituted “improper extraterritorial jurisdiction.”

title: In a Fracturing UK, Nigel Farage Emerges as Nationalist Nemesis
title_cn: 在支离破碎的英国，奈杰尔·法拉奇成为民族主义的克星
summary: With the UK government in crisis, the specter of a Reform leadership one day is shifting the political dynamic in Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland.

title: From Coal-Mining to Kingmaking, Makerfield Decides UK’s Future
title_cn: 从煤炭开采到造王，梅克菲尔德决定英国的未来
summary: For Andy Burnham, Makerfield is starting to look a lot like Frank Sinatra’s New York. If he can make it there, he’ll make it anywhere.

title: FDA Swaps Top Drug and Vaccine Regulators in Staff Overhaul
title_cn: FDA 在人员改革中调换顶级药物和疫苗监管机构
summary: Several key allies of former Food and Drug Administration commissioner Marty Makary are departing their posts, according to people familiar with the matter, as the Trump administration attempts to create a clean slate at the agency.

title: Trump Calls China Summit a 'Great Success'
title_cn: 特朗普称中国峰会“取得巨大成功”
summary: "It really was a historic moment," President Donald Trump says after returning from his two-day summit in China. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Chats With Japan’s Takaichi on Alliance After Xi Meeting
title_cn: 特朗普在习近平会晤后与日本高市讨论同盟
summary: Donald Trump spoke by phone with Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi and they affirmed the strength of the two countries’ alliance after the US President’s visit to Beijing, according to the Japanese government.

title: Trump Leaves China With No Resolution | Balance of Power: Late Edition 05/15/2026
title_cn: 特朗普没有任何解决方案就离开中国权力平衡：最新版 05/15/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Senator Chris Coons (D-DE), says President Trump went to China on "a weaker footing" and warns his silence on Taiwan arms sales was "a critical step backwards" for US interests. Christopher Smart, Managing Partner and Founder of the Arbroath Group, says incoming Fed Chair Kevin Warsh cannot "credibly" argue for rate cuts "at this stage," as energy prices surge and inflation pressures build. Martin’s Tavern Owner, Bill Martin, on reaction to Saturday Night Live opening its show last weekend with a shot of the DC institution and the history and staying power of the restaurant. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump, Xi Project Hormuz Alignment Despite No Iran Progress
title_cn: 尽管伊朗问题没有取得进展，特朗普和习近平仍计划霍尔木兹结盟
summary: China called for a rapid reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a goal it shares with the US, though there was no sign of a breakthrough between the superpowers on how to achieve that after President Donald Trump’s trip to Beijing.

title: Trump’s IRS Suit May End With a $1.7 Billion Compensation Fund
title_cn: 特朗普的国税局诉讼可能以 17 亿美元赔偿基金结束
summary: Victims of so-called government weaponization could seek money from the proposed fund.

title: DC Landmark Gets The ‘SNL’ Treatment
title_cn: DC地标建筑获得“SNL”待遇
summary:
For generations, Martin's Tavern in Georgetown has been a gathering place for presidents, lawmakers, journalists and insiders. And last weekend, it got a fresh national spotlight, when Saturday Night Live opened its show with a shot of the DC institution. Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power" host Joe Mathieu spoke with owner Billy Martin - the fourth Billy Martin to own and operate the restaurant - about its history and its staying power.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warsh Can't Push Cuts 'At This Stage:' Christopher Smart
title_cn: 克里斯托弗·斯马特：沃什“现阶段无法推动削减”
summary: Christopher Smart, Managing Partner and Founder of the Arbroath Group, says incoming Fed Chair Kevin Warsh cannot "credibly" argue for rate cuts "at this stage," as energy prices surge and inflation pressures build. He says the Trump-Xi summit was "good symbolically" but warns investors should be "particularly skeptical" of US trade announcements China does not confirm. Smart also says trading by the president and members of Congress undermines "credibility in markets" and government. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Rejects Virginia Democrats on Reviving Voting Map
title_cn: 最高法院驳回弗吉尼亚民主党关于恢复投票地图的决定
summary: The US Supreme Court rejected a last-ditch bid by Virginia Democrats to revive a voter-approved map that was designed to flip four Republican-held US House seats in the November election.

title: Enbridge Warms Up to New Canada Oil Pipeline After Carbon Compromise
title_cn: 安桥在碳妥协后为加拿大新石油管道做好准备
summary: Enbridge Inc. “definitely would consider” backing a new oil pipeline to Canada’s west coast, its chief executive officer said, giving an early vote of confidence hours after Prime Minister Mark Carney signed an energy deal with Alberta Premier Danielle Smith.

title: Trump to Decide Soon on Taiwan Arms Sale, Noncommittal to Xi
title_cn: 特朗普将很快决定对台军售，但对习近平不置可否
summary: US President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese President Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island.

title: Trump Took 'Critical Step Backwards' on Taiwan: Sen. Coons
title_cn: 库恩斯参议员：特朗普在台湾问题上迈出了“关键的倒退一步”
summary: Senator Chris Coons (D-DE), who serves on the Senate Foreign Relations Committee and Senate Appropriations Committee, says President Trump went to China on "a weaker footing" and warns his silence on Taiwan arms sales was "a critical step backwards" for US interests. He says China learned from the Strait of Hormuz closure that a blockade is "an incredibly powerful tool" and sees "no reason" to believe Xi Jinping will help pressure Iran to reopen the strait to other countries' ships. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Boeing Gets China Deal at Trump’s Visit, With Many Questions
title_cn: 波音在特朗普访华期间与中国达成协议，但存在诸多疑问
summary: Boeing Co. secured its long-awaited order from China during US President Donald Trump’s visit to the country, but details on the accord reached remained nebulous on aircraft type and timing.

title: US, Mexico Pursue Sinaloa Officials Facing US Drug Charges
title_cn: 美国和墨西哥追捕面临美国毒品指控的锡那罗亚州官员
summary: Authorities in Mexico and the US are pressing ahead on the crackdown against officials from the state of Sinaloa, even as Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum has suggested there’s not enough evidence to extradite them.

title: Oil Prices Spook Investors, Consumers Feel Price Crunch | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/15/2026
title_cn: 石油价格令投资者感到恐慌，消费者感到价格紧缩彭博商业周刊日报 5/15/2026
summary: Today, Tyler Kendall wraps up Trump's summit with China's Xi Jinping from Beijing. Then, Priya Misra and Marta Norton break down the geoeconomics landscape as oil prices push bond yields higher and spark a stock selloff. Plus, Brad Stone talks his profile of Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and the big bets the company is making on AI. Finally, Blake Leonard, discusses consumer trends in the beverage market and how her family is keeping costs low for shoppers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s More Than 3,700 Trades Astonish Wall Street Insiders
title_cn: 特朗普的 3,700 多笔交易令华尔街业内人士震惊
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosures show that he or his investment advisers made more than 3,700 trades in the first quarter, a flurry totaling tens of millions of dollars and involving major companies that have dealings with his administration.

title: US Farmers Hoping the Trump-Xi Summit Will Lift Sagging Fortunes
title_cn: 美国农民希望特习峰会能够提振萎靡不振的财富
summary: The agriculture industry has been hit by higher costs, declining exports

title: Trump Administration Aims to Speed Oil Permitting in Alaska
title_cn: 特朗普政府旨在加快阿拉斯加的石油许可
summary: The Trump administration plans to streamline the permitting process for oil developments inside the National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska as it pushes to accelerate crude production in the US Arctic.

title: Iran-Linked Militant Plotted Attacks in US, Europe, DOJ Says
title_cn: 美国司法部称，与伊朗有关的武装分子策划在美国和欧洲发动袭击
summary: The US charged an Iraqi national with participating in terrorist attacks against US targets, including a planned synagogue bombing in New York and the European offices of two American banks.

title: Border Arrests Rise for Third Straight Month to Most Under Trump
title_cn: 特朗普治下边境逮捕人数连续第三个月上升至最多
summary: Migrant arrests at the US-Mexico border edged up to the most in President Donald Trump’s second term after plunging when he returned to office in January 2025.

title: Trump Wraps Up China Trip | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/15/2026
title_cn: 特朗普结束中国之行|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the conclusion of President Trump's trip to China. On today's show, Republican Congressman Vince Fong, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Third Way Executive Vice President Jim Kessler and former Fed Vice Chair Lael Brainard. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rio de Janeiro Fuel Fraud Probe Sweeps Up Head of Refining Group
title_cn: 里约热内卢炼油集团负责人遭燃油欺诈调查
summary: Brazil’s top court ordered the arrest of the head of a private refining group in the latest effort to crack down on organized crime infiltrating in the formal economy.

title: Israel, Lebanon Extend Ceasefire 45 Days After Washington Talks
title_cn: 华盛顿会谈后以色列和黎巴嫩延长停火 45 天
summary: Israel and Lebanon agreed to extend a ceasefire for 45 days to allow for more talks, the US State Department said on Friday, as the Trump administration tries to tamp down a conflict that’s made ending the war against Iran more difficult.
